description: A planner needs to move inventory of a product from a main manufacturing site to a regional distribution center to rebalance stock.

nodes.task_description: Check the inventory levels at both the source and destination locations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the source has excess stock and the destination is low.

nodes.task_description: Create a new stock transfer order in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully initiates the transfer order.

nodes.task_description: Specify the product, quantity, source location, and destination location, then submit the order to the warehouse for picking.

expected_outcome.value: Agent completes the order details, and it becomes a pending shipment for the source warehouse.
